channel.title: Sagee's Morning Brief
channel.description: A personalized daily brief covering weather, markets, and the day ahead. Auto-generated every morning.
channel.itunes:author: Sagee
channel.itunes:summary: A personalized daily brief covering weather, markets, and the day ahead. Auto-generated every morning.

item.title: Thursday, May 28, 2026
item.description: Tel Aviv weather, yesterday's market close, and a thought to start your day.
item.itunes:summary: Tel Aviv weather, yesterday's market close, and a thought to start your day.

item.title: Monday, May 25, 2026
item.description: Tel Aviv weather, Friday's market close, your calendar for the day, and a thought to carry with you.
item.itunes:summary: Tel Aviv weather, Friday's market close, your calendar for the day, and a thought to carry with you.
